ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pump_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the pump */,
  "psi" INTEGER /* Pounds per square inch (PSI) */,
  "tdh_feet" REAL /* Total dynamic head in feet */,
  "tdh_meters" REAL /* Total dynamic head in meters */,
  "motor_voltage" INTEGER /* Motor voltage */,
  "motor_amps" REAL /* Motor current in amps */,
  "us_gpm" REAL /* Gallons per minute (GPM) in US units */,
  "lpm" REAL /* Liters per minute (LPM) */,
  "motor_watts" INTEGER /* Motor power consumption in watts */,
  "solar_array_watts" INTEGER /* Solar array power output in watts */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency percentage */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance was recorded */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the motor or ambient environment */,
  "vibration" REAL /* Vibration levels to detect potential issues */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity levels */,
  "water_quality" REAL /* Water quality (e.g., pH, turbidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pump_performance_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pumps" (
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pump */,
  "pump_model" TEXT /* Model of the pump */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the pump is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the pump was installed */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for the pump */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the pump manufacturer */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty for the pump expires */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solar_arrays" (
  "solar_array_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solar array */,
  "panel_count" INTEGER /* Number of solar panels in the array */,
  "orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the solar panels (e.g., North, South) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the solar array was installed */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for the solar array */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the solar panel manufacturer */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty for the solar array expires */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solar_array_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance was recorded */,
  "recorded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the performance */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the performance was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_log_recorded_by FOREIGN KEY ("recorded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_log_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES pump_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump or solar array */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., pump, solar array) */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance was performed */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES solar_arrays ("solar_array_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump or solar array */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., pump, solar array) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User ID of the person responsible for resolving the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES solar_arrays ("solar_array_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
